app.title: NT-Claw
app.subtitle: Launch Pad
app.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset and return to onboarding? Current configuration will be kept, but you will need to go through the setup steps again.

chat.title: Core Chat
chat.placeholder: Type a command or prompt for the core...
chat.empty: No messages yet. Start a chat to create context.
chat.fallbackLocal: External channel is offline, switched to local core command path
chat.unavailable: Chat IPC is unavailable in this environment
chat.coreRequired: Core is not running. Start Gateway (Core) before sending a chat message

monitor.gatewayDesc: Maintains communication stability for all AI agents.

telegramPairing.title: Pending Telegram Pairing
telegramPairing.desc: When Telegram DMs use pairing mode, new users appear here first and must be approved before they can interact.
telegramPairing.empty: There are no pending Telegram pairing requests right now.
telegramPairing.authorizedEmpty: There are no authorized Telegram users yet.
telegramPairing.missingConfig: Config Path is not set, so Telegram pairing state cannot be loaded.
telegramPairing.missingCorePath: Core Path is not set, so Telegram pairing cannot be approved.
telegramPairing.clearFailed: Failed to clear pending Telegram pairing requests
telegramPairing.clearedLog: >>> Cleared all pending Telegram pairing requests

monitor.openFolderUnavailable: This environment does not support opening folders

taskSection.title: Task Operations
taskSection.ackedHint: Acknowledged events: {{count}} (temporarily hidden until TTL expires).

logs.approvalRollback: Approval {{id}} failed and optimistic state rolled back

health.gatewayStopped: Gateway is offline or not started.
health.runtimeMissing: Runtime snapshot is not available yet.

filters.empty: No alerts in this level right now.

alerts.snapshotWaitingDesc: Runtime snapshot is not available yet, showing initial state.
alerts.noActiveSessionsDesc: No observable execution sessions right now. Service may not be started or source may be degraded.
alerts.allClearDesc: System signals are stable. Continue monitoring.

settings.corePathPlaceholder: Leave empty for system default path
settings.externalTerminalDesc: When enabled, start/stop Gateway always opens an external Terminal window; when disabled, commands run in background.

logs.autoDetectSuccess: >>> Auto detection complete: Connected to Mecha Core
logs.configSaved: >>> Configuration saved to local disk successfully

welcome.title: Welcome to NT-Claw
welcome.subtitle: Before infusing a soul into the lobster, please tell us your situation:
welcome.existingDesc: I already have a working OpenClaw environment, now passing it to a more advanced mecha wrapper.
welcome.newDesc: This is my first time. Please guide me through a brand new setup and create my first lobster soul.
welcome.architectureDesc: The system will precisely manage your core, config, and workspace through 'Tri-Zone' architecture.

steps.installing: Installing superpower dependencies for the lobster...
steps.success: Congratulations! Your OpenClaw soul is infused.

logs.nodeError: Environment check failed. Please ensure Node.js is installed.
logs.quickSync: >>> [WIZARD] Existing configuration detected. Skipping write to align connection directly...
logs.savingConfigForModel: >>> [WIZARD] Saving model config ({{model}}) to local secure storage...

error.title: Oops! Something went wrong during installation.

wip.desc: This might take a few seconds, please do not close the application...

success.title: Ready to Go!
success.desc:
Your OpenClaw Commander is online.
You can now enter the dashboard to collaborate with your AI.

ui.finalLaunchDesc: 這是最後一步。背景服務安裝選項只會在這裡出現並生效。
ui.partialFailureTitle: 部分服務未就緒 (Partial Services Down)
ui.partialFailureDesc: 檢查發現部分服務探測異常，您可以在 Dashboard 中手動啟動。
ui.partialFailureHint: 提示：您可以重試檢查，或直接進入 Dashboard。

title.reconnect: Link and Return to Mecha Core

subtitle.reconnectDesc: "Familiar soul frequency detected, preparing to reconnect..."
subtitle.needAlign: "To activate the mecha, three-zone paths must be aligned first"
subtitle.aligned: "Three zones aligned successfully, preparing to load core soul"

paths.title: Mecha Tri-Zone Path System
paths.confirmPathBtn: Confirm Paths and Setup Core Manually

autoDetect.title: Existing Soul Detected!
autoDetect.desc: Model and API aligned. Ready to launch mecha.

modelSelect.c35Desc: Top-tier coding and logic, highly recommended.
modelSelect.gpt4oDesc: Strong overall performance, fast, comprehensive ecosystem.
modelSelect.keyHelper: Key is encrypted and stored locally. Leave empty if using local/custom models.
modelSelect.c37Desc: 最強混合推論，程式與邏輯推薦首選。
modelSelect.deepseekDesc: 超高性價比，適合大規模自動化任務。
modelSelect.geminiDesc: 極速多模態，支援長文本脈絡處理。
modelSelect.ollamaDesc: 本地運行，數據不出門。需搭配 Ollama 環境。
modelSelect.vllmDesc: 對接自定義推論後端或兼容轉發服務。
modelSelect.authHealthWarning: 偵測到授權風險：critical {{critical}} / warn {{warn}}。建議先到 Settings > 授權管理修復後再啟動。
modelSelect.pathRequiredError: 請先完成三區路徑設定（Core / Config / Workspace）後再進行模型授權。
modelSelect.tokenCommandRequired: 請先輸入要執行的指令
modelSelect.authorizeSoulCore: 向靈魂核心授權 (Authorize Soul Core)
modelSelect.tokenCommandTitle: CLI 指令（直接取得 Token）
modelSelect.tokenCommandHint: 執行後請在彈出的終端機完成授權，取得 Token 後貼到上方 API 密鑰欄位。
modelSelect.noApiKeyNeeded: ✓ 此授權模式無須輸入 API 密鑰。按下授權後將會進行對應的驗證流程（如自動開啟瀏覽器或本地服務）。

choiceDesc.anthropicApiKey: 輸入您的 API 密鑰
choiceDesc.setupTokenCli: 貼上由 CLI 產生的 Setup-Token
choiceDesc.openaiApiKey: 輸入您的 sk- API 密鑰
choiceDesc.openaiCodexOauth: 透過瀏覽器登入授權，無須輸入 Key
choiceDesc.geminiApiKey: 輸入您的 AIzaSy... 密鑰
choiceDesc.googleGeminiCliOauth: 非官方 OAuth 流程授權
choiceDesc.minimaxApiKey: 官方 API Key 授權
choiceDesc.ollamaLocal: 本地運行開源模型 (11434 端口)，隱私至上
choiceDesc.vllmLocal: 自定義本地伺服器 / OpenAI 相容介面
choiceDesc.chutesOauth: 透過 Chutes OAuth 登入
choiceDesc.openrouterApiKey: 支援多種模型，包含 Llama 3

choiceHelp.setupTokenCli: 可在下方直接執行「claude setup-token」來獲取授權 Token

modelSelect.neuralLinking: 「神經連結建立中，請保持頻率一致...」

daemon.title: Background Gateway Service
daemon.desc: Disabled by default. When off, both OAuth and non-OAuth onboarding explicitly skip daemon installation so no macOS launchd service is written.
daemon.disabled: Background service will not be installed

skillManager.title: Skill Plugin Matrix
skillManager.securityDesc: Core skills are system-protected and cannot be disabled. Workspace skills are dynamically loaded from your configuration directory and governed by OpenClaw ACL command permissions.

guide.core: The following skills are system-level, persistent, and cannot be disabled, ensuring AI core stability.
guide.workspace: The following skills are dynamically mounted from the <0>skills/</0> directory in your workspace and can be enabled/disabled.

status.loadCoreError: Failed to get core skills, please try rescanning.
status.emptyWorkspace: No extension skills installed in current workspace. Place skill folders into your workspace's <0>skills/</0> directory, then click the refresh icon on the top right to mount.
status.deleteConfirm: 確定要移除技能「{{name}}」嗎？這將會刪除工作區內的資料夾且無法還原。
status.electronUnavailable: electronAPI 不可用，請確認 Electron 環境正確啟動。
status.parseError: 技能資料解析失敗，請重試。

browser.desc: Control browser to execute web operations

coding.desc: Invoke Claude Code for software development
coding.details: Deeply integrated with script generation and Git auto-commit.

search.desc: Full-web search using the Brave API
search.details: Requires BRAVE_API_KEY configuration to enable real-time search.

market.desc: Monitor brand & product PR risk signals
market.details: Periodically crawls social media and news for sentiment analysis.

cron.details: Manages Moltbot's periodic custom task execution.

setupMessaging.title: 繫結您的通訊頻道 (Bonding Channel)
setupMessaging.subtitle: OpenClaw 需要一個加密頻道與您建立心靈感應
setupMessaging.subtitleLocked: 「機甲通訊模組已就緒，等待最後指令...」
setupMessaging.noTokenNeeded: ✓ 此頻道無須在此輸入 Token。在稍後的「核心發射」階段，CLI 將自動引導您完成互動式認證登入程序。

telegram.desc: Bot API， 最推薦的加密頻道

whatsapp.desc: WhatsApp Web QR 連結模式
whatsapp.placeholder: 無須輸入，稍後掃描 QR Code

irc.desc: 連線至傳統 IRC 伺服器網域
irc.keyLabel: IRC Server / Nick (稍後詳細設定)

slack.desc: 原生 Socket Mode 支援

signal.desc: 透過 signal-cli 連接，高隱私
signal.placeholder: Signal REST API URL 或留空

guide.step2Suffix: 並依照指示為您的龍蝦命名（需以 _bot 結尾）。
guide.step3: 完成後，BotFather 會給您一串 API Token。請務必妥善保管，切勿外流。
guide.tip: 小秘訣：這隻 Bot 將成為您與 OpenClaw 的專屬加密頻道，所有的分析回報都將在此進行。

setupSkills.title: Expand Your Lobster Superpowers
setupSkills.subtitle: Select the extra skills you want to install from ClawHub{{detected}}.

manager.title: Empower Your Lobster with Super Skills
manager.subtitle: Manage installed skills here: rescan, import, or remove. Toggle ability switches in the dashboard Skill Manager.
manager.emptyDesc: Import skills first, or make sure a skills directory exists under Workspace or Config path, then rescan.
manager.errorParse: Failed to parse skill data. Please try again later.
manager.errorMissingBaseDir: Workspace or config path is not set yet. Please finish initialization first.

telegram.title: Telegram Channel Plugin
telegram.desc: OpenClaw's most recommended channel — full privacy chat & command interaction support.

discord.title: Discord Channel Plugin
discord.desc: Join a Discord server with multi-channel collaboration and complex permission management.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Channel Plugin
whatsapp.desc: Integrate a WhatsApp Business account so your AI replies directly in your chat app.

obsidian.title: Obsidian Knowledge Base
obsidian.desc: Sync your Obsidian notes so the AI has a persistent second-brain memory.

notion.title: Notion Coordinator
notion.desc: Auto-organize tasks and update pages with deep Notion project integration.

maps.title: Google Maps Navigator
maps.desc: Search locations, check opening hours and traffic — your all-in-one life assistant.

setupInitialize.title: 建立您的專案基地
setupInitialize.subtitle: 請指定三個關鍵目錄來存放您的核心、配置與工作空間。
setupInitialize.downloadMethod: 下載與部署方式 (推薦網路環境較弱時使用 ZIP)
setupInitialize.configDesc: 存放 openclaw.json 等設定檔
setupInitialize.startBtn: 開始初始化並下載核心原始碼
setupInitialize.startBtnDownload: 開始初始化並下載核心原始碼
setupInitialize.pathNotEmpty: 此目錄非空，請選擇一個空的資料夾以避免檔案衝突。
setupInitialize.pathWarning: 此目錄非空，將自動建立名為 '{{name}}' 的子資料夾進行初始化。
setupInitialize.pathNotExist: 此目錄尚不存在，初始化時將自動建立。
setupInitialize.success: 初始化完成！正在進入下一步...
setupInitialize.cancelSuccess: >>> 已取消下載進程並清理環境。
setupInitialize.configPathWarning: ⚠️ 此目錄已有 OpenClaw 設定（含授權資料）。新建專案建議改用全新目錄，避免繼承舊授權。
setupInitialize.zipModeDesc: 💡 已為您選擇最穩定的傳輸方案，避開 Git 卡頓，確保部署成功。
setupInitialize.summaryNoNewFiles: Success. No new files were created in this run; existing paths were reused.
setupInitialize.nextStepBtn: 點擊此處繼續下一步 (Next Step)
